label: Upload to Upload Post
description: Upload content (video, photo, or text) to social platforms via Upload Post API (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, etc.). Post type is auto-detected from available data or can be set explicitly. Platform, media, title, description, and other inputs can come from row variables with default fallbacks.

inputs.description: Row variable for post type (video, photo, text). Auto-detected if empty.
Row variable for platform(s), e.g. platform
Row variable for video URL (videoUrl, video, generatedVideo)
Row variable for photo URL(s) (comma-separated or JSON array)
Row variable for link URL (text posts with link preview)
Row variable for Upload Post user identifier
Row variable for Upload Post API key
Row variable for Facebook Page ID
Row variable for LinkedIn Page ID (organization)
Row variable for Pinterest Board ID
Row variable for additional platform-specific params (JSON object)

outputs.description: Row variable to store API response (full body or results)
Row variable to store the HTTP status code

formSchema.label: Post type variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable for post type (video, photo, text). Leave empty for auto-detection.

formSchema.label: Default post type
formSchema.hint: auto | video | photo | text. 'auto' detects from available data.

formSchema.label: Platform variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable for platform(s). Falls back to platformDefault.

formSchema.label: Default platform(s)
formSchema.hint: Comma-separated or single. Used when variable empty.

formSchema.label: Video URL variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable for video URL. Also checks video, generatedVideo.

formSchema.label: Photo URL(s) variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable for photo URL(s). Comma-separated or JSON array.

formSchema.label: Title variable key
formSchema.hint: Required for text posts, YouTube/Reddit videos. Falls back to titleDefault.

formSchema.label: Link URL variable key (text posts)
formSchema.hint: URL for link preview card on text posts (LinkedIn, Bluesky, Facebook, Reddit).

formSchema.label: API key variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable for Upload Post API key. Required.

formSchema.label: Subreddit variable key (Reddit)
formSchema.hint: Required for Reddit posts. Subreddit name without r/.

formSchema.label: LinkedIn Page ID variable key
formSchema.hint: LinkedIn organization/page ID for posting to a company page.

formSchema.label: Extra fields variable (optional)
formSchema.hint: Row variable containing JSON object of additional platform-specific params.

formSchema.label: Timeout (ms)
formSchema.hint: Request timeout. Default 120s for large uploads.
